3037050.name: Latens
3037050.description:
Overview:

Latens is a revolutionary application that uses real-time AI generation as its game engine, offering a unique and fully customizable experience. Each adventure in Latens begins with an apparently empty screen, an "entropic canvas" that transforms into a dynamic dreamlike world as the player interacts with it. Become the director of your own lucid dream, exploring and creating in an environment that continuously adapts to your preferences.

Key Features:

- Real-Time AI Generation: Unique and adaptive experiences in every game session.
- Dynamic Interactivity: A world that responds to your actions in real time.
- Lucid Dream Simulator: Navigate through personalized dreamlike adventures.
- Technological Innovation: Generation of frames instead of just assets, creating an experience akin to an interactive movie.
